description_long: This object is a rectangular whisky box with a striking red and black tartan plaid pattern covering its entire exterior. The front and back faces display a large, ornate silver emblem featuring three stylized vessels and intertwined decorative initials, giving it a luxurious and traditional appearance. Below the emblem, gold text reads 'SET' and additional smaller text, both centrally aligned. The box is tall and has a rigid, straight-edged form, suggesting it is designed to house a premium bottle of whisky. The tartan pattern is consistent on all sides, with the emblem and text repeated on both the front and back, while the sides are narrower but maintain the same decorative motif. The surface appears to be made of glossy, coated cardboard or paperboard, providing a hard and smooth tactile quality.
description: A tall, rectangular whisky box with a red tartan plaid pattern, ornate silver emblem, and gold text, exuding a premium and traditional style.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full tartan pattern, a large silver emblem, and gold text 'SET' with smaller text beneath, all centrally placed.
description_view_1: The left side view is narrower, displaying the same emblem and gold text but with less width, emphasizing the box's depth.
description_view_2: The back view mirrors the front, with the same tartan pattern, silver emblem, and gold text, maintaining symmetry.
description_view_3: The right side view is similar to the left, narrow with the emblem and gold text, highlighting the box's tall, slim profile.
attribute_label_or_branding: The box features a large, ornate silver emblem with three vessels and intertwined initials on both the front and back, centrally placed. Below the emblem, gold text reads 'SET' in uppercase, with smaller gold text beneath it. The text and emblem are both centered and occupy a significant portion of the face. No other branding or legible wording is visible.
attribute_distillery_emblem: A large, ornate silver emblem featuring three vessels and intertwined initials is prominently displayed on both the front and back of the box.
